title: Cobblemon Battle Extras
description: Cobblemon add-on that enhances battling and enables in-battle keyboard/controller support!
body: ### [Please consider supporting me on ko-fi if you like the mod and can afford it, I appreciate even 1 dollar. ](https://ko-fi.com/raguto) --- _**I grant permission to anyone seeking to add my mod to a modpack**_ --- ## Cobblemon Battle Extras Cobblemon Battle Extras expands Cobblemon's battle UI with more useful information, cleaner overlays, better tooltips, stronger battle logging, and improved battle flow support for regular battles, PvP, Battle Tower, and co-op. It focuses on battle quality-of-life without changing Cobblemon's core mechanics. --- ### Better Battle HUD - Weather, terrain, room, and screen turn counters - Field effect tracking - Stat stage displays - Entry hazard icons - Volatile status icons - Type icons on battlers - Adaptive type handling for Mega, Tera, and other type-changing effects - 3D in-battle nameplates and extra overlay information ### Better Move & Switch Tooltips - Detailed move tooltips with power, accuracy, PP, priority, crit chance, and effect info - Adaptive move descriptions and effectiveness readouts - Switch tooltips that show your Pokemon's moves, ability, and speed - Cleaner tooltip formatting and improved readability ### Battle Info Panel - Tracks revealed opponent moves - Tracks revealed abilities - Tracks revealed held items - Full weakness strip with all types visible at once - Improved weakness and resistance tooltips - Better support for trainer battles, Battle Tower, and co-op ### Enhanced Battle Log - Color-coded battle log with better readability - Proper player/opponent side grouping - Move links with hover/click tooltips - Damage percent display on damaging move lines - Battle log viewer support - Battle log recording for PvP and NPC battles - Multiple built-in color themes - Default battle log viewer keybind: `B` ### Controls & Accessibility - Keyboard support for battles - Controller-friendly battle navigation - Compatible with MidnightControls - Compatible with Controllify - Compatible with Controllable ### Extra Support - Wild battles - Trainer battles - PvP - Battle Tower - Co-op battles ### Config Almost every major feature can be toggled or adjusted in the config, so you can keep only the parts you want. Optional server-side synced settings are also supported for features like battle speed and hidden opponent ball types.
